He then helps Agastya to woo Pia, but ends up falling in love with her all over again.

programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: The Age of Blood

programme.title: Caesar

programme.title: Beyond

programme.title: Faster Than Light: the Dream of Interstellar Flight
programme.desc: Next-generation rocket technology is fueling the dream of traveling across the void.

programme.title: From There to Here
programme.desc: Technology is on the brink of taking us places we have only dreamed of.

programme.title: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: As we take a closer look at Mercury and Venus, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: The possibility of life on Mars has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system.

programme.title: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution.

programme.title: The Gas Giants
programme.desc: In the cold, dark expanse of our solar system, beyond the asteroid belt, lie the giant planets.

programme.title: The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: The mysterious moons of the gas giants may hold much more than we ever imagined.

programme.title: The Sun
programme.desc: We study the sun closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists peer more closely at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets.

programme.title: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: Most of what we see is actually dark matter and dark energy, but its nature eludes us... for the moment.

programme.title: Return to Disaster
programme.desc: Relive the harrowing moments in Launch Control during NASA's second "Return to Flight" test flight .

programme.title: Mars or Bust
programme.desc: As the clock ticks toward the critical Mars launch window, NASA scrambles to fix a critical space mistake.

programme.title: Space Shuttle Shuffle
programme.desc: Despite multiple pressures, a shocking discovery causes NASA to cancel a historic launch.

programme.title: Day Zero
programme.desc: Day Zero follows the lives of three best friends in New York City who have thirty days to come to terms with their fate, being drafted into the military. Rifkin (CHRIS KLEIN) is a married lawyer whose career is on the rise. Feller (ELIJAH WOOD) is working on his second novel. The first was a smash success, but he's having a writer's block. Dixon (JON BERNTHAL) drives a cab and lives a solitary life. Over thirty days, they will find their relationships tested as they confront long held beliefs about life, death, courage and love.

programme.title: Santa Fe Marshal
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Hopalong Cassidy is called when a town becomes overrun with bad guys. Disguised as a member of a medicine show, Hoppy discovers that the ringleader is none other than sweet li'l ol' Ma Burton.

programme.title: La Tierra Llamando A Ana
programme.desc: The story of a love, of a home, the story of Ana and Juan. The film also Features an amazing original composition written by the director.

programme.title: Roaring Abyss
programme.desc: A sound journey accros the mountains, deserts and forests of Ethiopia and its cultural universe. Roaring Abyss will take you through an inedit collection of music recordings of unvaluable importance for the transmission and preservation of the African heritage.

programme.title: Dreamcatcher
programme.desc: Julia, victim to multiple psychological disorders, must survive the night without her prescribed sedatives. In and out of sleep the only thing protecting her sanity is the Dreamcatcher.

programme.title: Iron Island
programme.desc: Some poor people in the Southern coasts of Iran do not have any place to live, and thus, they reside on an old, abandoned ship in the sea. Captain Nemat, their chief, tries to persuade the ship-owner and the official authorities not to get the ship back. On the other hand, he is selling the iron parts of the ship piece by piece. “Iron Island” is the story of those whose ignorance makes them simply trust those who are always ready to abuse their trust.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: The most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are under surveillance as the latest developments in finance, economics and investment is covered Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests create some intriguing conversation. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: In a remote village temple in India, a daring heist saw precious and ancient cultural heritage disappear two citizen detectives work to bring down one of the biggest art thieves in history. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Green Bible is the single-most important document in the Italian government's war against an alleged Nigerian mafia but this supposed mafia handbook isn't what it claims to be at all. (S3 E02)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The tale of the strange life and stranger murder of a rare violin collector and his daughter, as told by their friends and two suspects at the heart of the police investigation. (S3 E03)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: In 2021, Agnes Tirop broke the women's 10,000 meter world record five weeks later, she was dead "Bloomberg Investigates" examines her murder and the threat of violence for other Kenyan runners. (S2 E02)

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When Children Are Young, Parents Care For Them And Give Them All They Need To Live A Good Life. The Circle Of Life, However, Means That One Day, It Is The Children'S Turn To Care For Their Parents And Give Them A Happy Retired Life. In The Current Moral Fabric Of Society, Rarely And Not Often It Works Out That Way. It Didn'T Happen That Way With Savita Too, As Her Children Had No Time To Look After Her. So She Decided Not To Settle Out And Reinvent Her Life. She Embarks On A Journey To Discover Herself And To Make Her Own Identity As An Individual. Janani Tells An Inspirational Story Of A Mother Who Rose Against All Odds And Became Successful.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Maa Shakti
programme.desc: Maa Shakti who is known as the divine force in Hinduism. She is considered the source of power and creation and can transform herself into various forms

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Live Shows with Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah Zwi is a musician, actress, and artist.Through an innovative, educational experience, the productions expose children to the English language in an enchanting and inventive way. They encourage good moral values, creativity and using your imagination!Beautifully crafted sceneries transport the audience to magical realities and create fantastical memories! Stories are acted out in exquisite costumes with puppets and props which come to life before your eyes and encourage the viewer to use their imagination!The productions feature original handmade sets, captivating vocal performances of original music as well as loved Disney and musical theatre classics, cheeky puppet shows, and inventive storytelling. The Savannah Kids experience enlightens both the spirit and the soul, aiming to bond and delight families entrancing and entertaining, inspiring young minds.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Tyohaar Ki Thaali
programme.desc: Sakshi Tanwar in Tyohaar Ki Thaali decides to celebrate one festival a week and along with the celebration, she also prepares two dishes from her mom's diary which is her prized possession. Along with preparing the dishes she also reminisces into the moments of how she celebrated some festivals and also shares some stories about the Gods.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Chef Spencer starts this spicy barbeque episode with flavours from Thailand with a Bok Choy with a Ginger Chili Sauce. Powerful bird's eye chilies are packed into a sweet and spicy sauce and served over tasty grilled bok choy. Spencer then introduces us to Calabrian chilies, mashed into a spice paste and rubbed on butterflied chicken that then gets grilled to flame-kissed perfection. Next, Spencer gives fresh calamari some heat with Korean chilies that add their distinctive heat and flavour before grilling this scrumptious recipe and serving it over a comforting bed of rice and peas. Finally, Spencer prepares Seekh Kabobs, made with ground lamb spiked with punchy dried Kashmiri chilies and a blend of fresh hot peppers. (S2 E07)

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: First stop on Chef Spencer's Spanish flavour tour? Habanero Char-Grilled Octopus - warmed up with punchy chilies and balanced with a sweet and tangy sherry vinaigrette. Next, Spencer stuffs whole sea bass with citrus and herbs, gives it the grill treatment and then tops it with olive oil blistered cherry tomatoes. The rotisserie does the heavy lifting for Mr. Watts' whole roast chicken - spiked with bright Spanish flavours like Spanish chilies and smoked paprika, slow cooked and served extra juicy. Finally, Spencer prepares a classic Spanish recipe: Paella. Loaded saffron rice, piled high with chorizo, veggies, and shellfish. Of course, Spencer's Paella is made in the Spanish tradition outside, over the fire, on a beautiful sunny day! (S2 E08)

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Have you been up all night? There's a brunch for that! Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four decadent recipes including an indulgent Breakfast Poutine and chocolate Stuffed French Toast.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Inspired by flaky, buttery, and chocolatey dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four classic wholesome and hearty dishes for her Farmhouse Brunch.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Brunch is the most important meal of the weekend! Join host Vanessa Gianfrancesco as she whips up healthy and delicious recipes that'll awaken your taste buds.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Bring on the seafood! Home cook Mary Tang kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen 3 with a unique dish featuring chewy clams, sweet and bitter fermented black beans, and a collection of spices. Next, she makes us her favourite shrimp dish - Shrimp and Egg Fried Rice. Fluffy egg bits, lightly flavoured nutty brown rice, and a pop of tender shrimp works wonders for the taste buds. A common appetizer, Mary then walks us through a spicy concoction of deep-fried salt and pepper squid or Calamari. And who doesn't love lobster? Mary finishes off with Cantonese Lobster with Ginger and Scallions (yes, it tastes as good as it sounds!). A Cantonese take on the juicy protein, this dish is fried in hot bubbling oil for a golden-brown crust, and steamed in great Shaoxing wine and salty soy sauce for some flavour. (S3 E06)

Mir Castle Complex, Belarus
programme.desc: Located in the small town center, Mir Castle's complex is one of the earliest monuments to exist to this day and the most essential. This centuries-old Castle, reflected magnificently in an adjoining pond, resembles a building straight out of fairy tales. The common name 'mir' shared by the Castle and the town literally translates to 'peace' this justifies the fact that the Castle's sole purpose was built to bring harmony and peace to the region, followed by the signing of several peace treaties.

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Jakarta Old Town, Indonesia, Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Jakarta,Indonesia one of the Old Town of the world heritage. And today shall take you around Jakarta Old Town, also known as Kota Tua.

programme.title: Jakarta Old Town, Indonesia, Part2
programme.desc: is documentary series about the old town of Jakarta. Often referred to as Kota Tua Jakarta or Old Batavia, the old center is a neighborhood in the central city of Jakarta.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. We are in Indonesia.

programme.title: Budapest Inner City Mother Church of the Blessed Virgin, Hungary
programme.desc: Budapest Inner City Parish Church, officially the Church of the Blessed Virgin Mary in Budapest, is a Church raised on a the ruins of a Roman settlement time.

programme.title: Budapest life from Roman times onward Hungary
Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris.

programme.title: Cathedral La Major, Marseille, France
programme.desc: Just on the outskirts of the delightfully vibrant Marseille, lies what locals affectionately call the Cathedral of La Major. An impressive Roman Catholic cathedral and basilica minor, this astounding architectural gem stands guard over the Old-Port of Marseille. It is a respected, protected much loved-national monument of France: The Cathedral of Sainte-Marie-Majeure, or The Major as locals called it.

programme.title: The Giza Pyramid Complex, Egypt
programme.desc: Around the ancient capital city of Memphis, in Egypt, located just south of modern-day Cairo, are the greatest and strangest structures ever created by humankind, The Egyptian Pyramids.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: The Palace Museum (The Forbidden City), China (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Forbidden City, also known as the Palace Museum, is located in the center of Beijing. From 1368 to 1911, it was the Chinese imperial Palace of the Ming and Qing dynasties. It is a World Heritage Site as one of the best-preserved ancient wooden palace complexes. A documentary series in two episodes.

programme.title: Plovdiv, The city on seven hills, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Few places have a history like Plovdiv. Its hilly landscape bears the marks of many great civilizations – from the mysterious Thracian tribes, to ancient Greece and Persia, to the Roman Empire, all the way to the Bulgarian Empire, the Ottomans and even Tsarist Russia. In fact, Plovdiv is one of the oldest cities in Europe.

programme.title: Kaleto Archaeological Complex & Vrachanski Balkan Nature Park, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Located in northwestern Bulgaria, in the Vratsa Province, Mezdra is a small, picturesque town sitting along the left bank of the Iskar River. Discover the historical heritage of a living city: the Kaleto Archaeological Complex and the Vrachanski Balkan Nature Park. They are containing karst landscapes and habitats with more than 600 caves.
